items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird). However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this functionality. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
